content_blocks.body_md:
Theophylline is the third of the three dietary methylxanthines, found in trace
amounts in tea and used as a drug to open the airways. It shares caffeine's
chemistry but lingers longer in the body.

why_it_matters.text: A close relative of caffeine that turns up in tea, and a mild stimulant of its own.
